text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Finally, the spring Tenno Sho is here.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Good luck, McQueen! Get that third title!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: You can do it! Smash that record!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen has already won the spring
Tenno Sho twice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's why beating her today would be a miracle
that nobody expects. So...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
No matter how far ahead of me she gets, I won't
give up.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Were you not the one to invite us here?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: B-but you guys are all too fast! Wait uuup!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Good luck out there, Rice! We'll be cheering you
on from the stands!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
...I'm looking forward to seeing you become a
blue rose.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My objective here is to observe your victory, not
your defeat.
